content: Two main release action ecosystems: (1) taiki-e/upload-rust-binary-action@v1 + taiki-e/create-gh-release-action@v1: highly focused, auto-generates sha256 checksums, default archive naming is {bin}-{target}.tar.gz, supports cross-rs and cargo-zigbuild via build_tool input. (2) cargo-dist: generates entire CI workflow, handles installer scripts, but has known issues with aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu cross-compilation (issue #1378 open). cargo-dist is higher-level but less transparent; taiki-e actions are lower-level but reliable. Recommendation: taiki-e actions for a project that already has Cargo.toml well-configured.
